title: Operation Checkmate: 30 Indians held for illegally working as truck drivers in US, deportation likely
summary_full: US Border Patrol's Operation Checkmate has led to the arrest of approximately 30 Indian nationals working illegally as commercial truck drivers in Arizona. These individuals, along with others from different countries, are facing deportation. The operation aimed to enhance public safety by enforcing immigration laws and identifying undocumented drivers operating heavy vehicles.
